options.command: AWS_PROFILE=${AWS_PROFILE:-hepe-admin-mfa} AWS_REGION=${AWS_REGION:-us-east-1} APP_PATH=apps/cdk-emc-notary/instance DOMAIN=${DOMAIN:-emcnotary.com} pnpm exec tsx --tsconfig tools/tsconfig.json tools/remove-all-users.cli.ts ${DOMAIN:+--domain $DOMAIN} ${KEEP_ADMIN:+--keep-admin} ${DRY_RUN:+--dry-run}

options.command: AWS_PROFILE=${AWS_PROFILE:-hepe-admin-mfa} AWS_REGION=${AWS_REGION:-us-east-1} APP_PATH=apps/cdk-emc-notary/instance DOMAIN=${DOMAIN:-emcnotary.com} pnpm exec tsx --tsconfig tools/tsconfig.json tools/discover-users-from-mailboxes.cli.ts ${BACKUP_PATH:+--backup-path $BACKUP_PATH} ${DOMAIN:+--domain $DOMAIN} ${OUTPUT:+--output $OUTPUT} ${VALIDATE_STRUCTURE:+--validate-structure $VALIDATE_STRUCTURE} ${INCLUDE_METADATA:+--include-metadata $INCLUDE_METADATA} ${EXTRACT_TAR:+--extract-tar $EXTRACT_TAR} ${TEMP_DIR:+--temp-dir $TEMP_DIR}

admin:users:discover-from-mailboxes.description: Discover users from mailbox backup: Scans mailbox backup directory and extracts user information. Auto-discovers backup path when not specified, or use BACKUP_PATH to specify backup location.

options.command: AWS_PROFILE=${AWS_PROFILE:-hepe-admin-mfa} AWS_REGION=${AWS_REGION:-us-east-1} APP_PATH=apps/cdk-emc-notary/instance DOMAIN=${DOMAIN:-emcnotary.com} pnpm exec tsx --tsconfig tools/tsconfig.json tools/create-multiple-users.cli.ts --users ${USERS} ${DOMAIN:+--domain $DOMAIN} ${DEFAULT_PASSWORD:+--default-password $DEFAULT_PASSWORD} ${ADMIN_USERS:+--admin-users $ADMIN_USERS} ${WAIT_FOR_API_KEY:+--wait-for-api-key $WAIT_FOR_API_KEY} ${RETRY_ATTEMPTS:+--retry-attempts $RETRY_ATTEMPTS}

admin:users:create-multiple.description: Create multiple users from JSON: Creates multiple Mail-in-a-Box users from JSON file or inline JSON array (use USERS to specify JSON file path or inline JSON)

options.command: AWS_PROFILE=${AWS_PROFILE:-hepe-admin-mfa} AWS_REGION=${AWS_REGION:-us-east-1} APP_PATH=apps/cdk-emc-notary/instance DOMAIN=${DOMAIN:-emcnotary.com} pnpm exec tsx --tsconfig tools/tsconfig.json tools/restore-mailboxes.cli.ts --backup-path ${BACKUP_PATH} ${DOMAIN:+--domain $DOMAIN} ${DRY_RUN:+--dry-run} ${RESTART_SERVICES:+--restart-services $RESTART_SERVICES} ${VERIFY_AFTER_RESTORE:+--verify-after-restore $VERIFY_AFTER_RESTORE} ${EXTRACT_TAR:+--extract-tar $EXTRACT_TAR} ${TEMP_DIR:+--temp-dir $TEMP_DIR} ${BACKUP_FORMAT:+--backup-format $BACKUP_FORMAT}

admin:mailboxes:restore.description: Restore mailboxes from backup: Restores mailboxes from backup directory or tar.gz file (use BACKUP_PATH to specify backup location, use DRY_RUN=1 to preview)

options.command: AWS_PROFILE=${AWS_PROFILE:-hepe-admin-mfa} AWS_REGION=${AWS_REGION:-us-east-1} APP_PATH=apps/cdk-emc-notary/instance DOMAIN=${DOMAIN:-emcnotary.com} pnpm exec tsx --tsconfig tools/tsconfig.json tools/restore-aggregated-mailboxes.cli.ts ${BACKUP_FOLDERS:+--backup-folders $BACKUP_FOLDERS} ${BACKUP_BASE_DIR:+--backup-base-dir $BACKUP_BASE_DIR} ${DOMAIN:+--domain $DOMAIN} ${ADMIN_PASSWORD:+--admin-password $ADMIN_PASSWORD} ${NO_GENERATE_PASSWORDS:+--no-generate-passwords} ${NO_SKIP_EXISTING_USERS:+--no-skip-existing-users} ${NO_SKIP_EXISTING_EMAILS:+--no-skip-existing-emails} ${DRY_RUN:+--dry-run}

admin:mailboxes:restore-aggregated.description: Restore aggregated mailboxes: Aggregates users and emails from multiple backup folders (de-duplicated) and restores them to Mail-in-a-Box server

options.command: AWS_PROFILE=${AWS_PROFILE:-hepe-admin-mfa} AWS_REGION=${AWS_REGION:-us-east-1} APP_PATH=apps/cdk-emc-notary/instance DOMAIN=${DOMAIN:-emcnotary.com} USERS=${USERS} INCLUDE_DELETED=${INCLUDE_DELETED} pnpm exec tsx --tsconfig tools/tsconfig.json tools/sync-master-backup.cli.ts --master-backup-dir ${MASTER_BACKUP_DIR} ${DOMAIN:+--domain $DOMAIN} ${USERS:+--users $USERS} ${INCLUDE_DELETED:+--include-deleted} ${DRY_RUN:+--dry-run}

admin:mailboxes:sync-master.description: Sync master backup folder: Syncs master backup folder with mailserver (skips duplicates, use MASTER_BACKUP_DIR to specify master backup location, USERS to limit, INCLUDE_DELETED=1 to include trash)

options.command: AWS_PROFILE=${AWS_PROFILE:-hepe-admin-mfa} AWS_REGION=${AWS_REGION:-us-east-1} APP_PATH=apps/cdk-emc-notary/instance DOMAIN=${DOMAIN:-emcnotary.com} SOURCE_PATH=${SOURCE_PATH} USER=${USER} STAGING_DIR=${STAGING_DIR} pnpm exec tsx --tsconfig tools/tsconfig.json tools/aggregate-admin-mailbox.cli.ts --source-path ${SOURCE_PATH} ${DOMAIN:+--domain $DOMAIN} ${USER:+--user $USER} ${STAGING_DIR:+--staging-dir $STAGING_DIR} ${DRY_RUN:+--dry-run}

admin:mailboxes:aggregate-admin.description: Aggregate admin mailbox (cur/new + .Sent) with dedupe, skip trash, and upload (use SOURCE_PATH, USER, STAGING_DIR, DRY_RUN)

admin:mailboxes:pull.description: Pull mailboxes from server to local backup dir (use DESTINATION_DIR, USERS, DRY_RUN)

options.command: pnpm exec tsx --tsconfig tools/tsconfig.json tools/archive-master-backup.cli.ts --master-backup-dir ${MASTER_BACKUP_DIR} ${ARCHIVE_BASE_DIR:+--archive-base-dir $ARCHIVE_BASE_DIR} ${TIMESTAMP:+--timestamp $TIMESTAMP}

admin:mailboxes:archive-master.description: Archive master backup folder: Packages master backup folder into a date&timestamped archive folder (use MASTER_BACKUP_DIR to specify master backup location)

admin:restore:users-and-mailboxes.description: Combined restore workflow: Discovers users from mailbox backup, creates users, and restores mailboxes in a single operation (use BACKUP_PATH to specify backup location)

admin:dns:list.description: List Mail-in-a-Box DNS records: Retrieves and displays DNS configuration and records from the Mail-in-a-Box server

admin:dns:sync-react.description: Sync React DNS records: Updates DNS A records from backup file with Elastic IP from CloudFormation stack (use DRY_RUN=1 to preview changes)
